arts.ttl: Southampton vs Manchester City – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Southampton welcome Pep Guardiola’s Manchester City to St. Mary’s Stadium this afternoon. The Saints have already been relegated from the Premier League, while City have the opportunity to move level on points with Arsenal in second place with victory on the South Coast.
